results.rendered_html:
hāhā m. N. of a Gandharva.
— ind. An exclamation denoting pain, grief or surprise, (it is simply hā repeated for the sake of emphasis; see hā).
Comp.
— kāraḥ
1 a grief, lamentation, loud wailing.
(pb)
2 the din or uproar of battle.
— ravaḥ the cry hāhā.
